data.title: US Lawmakers Demand Tougher Action On Huawei's Secretive Chip Network
data.description: Lawmakers urge Commerce Dept to limit Huawei's access to US chip-making tech due to alleged sanctions evasion.

data.title: Florida Sheriff Backs Cannabis Legalization Amendment: 'I'm A Conservative With Strong Faith And Family Values'
data.description: Florida: Bradford County Sheriff backs Amendment 3, citing the need to legalize cannabis to reduce crime, protect lives, and help communities.

data.title: 12 Consumer Staples Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
12 Health Care Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
Kinder Morgan Q3 Earnings: Revenue Miss, EPS Miss, Guidance Lower, Shares Slide
data.description: Kinder Morgan reported third-quarter revenue of $3.699 billion, missing the consensus estimate of $3.975 billion, according to Benzinga Pro. The company reported quarterly earnings of 25 cents per share, missing analyst estimates of 27 cents per share.
